name: plan_sample_simple_travel
description: Plan travel routes for people in a simple city domain. Use when you need to find a sequence of actions (walk or taxi) to move people between locations. Automatically chooses walking for short distances (<=2 units) and taxis for longer distances if cash >= fare. Returns ordered actions like [a_call_taxi, a_ride_taxi, a_pay_driver] or [a_walk]. Persons: alice ($20), bob ($15). Locations: home_a, home_b, park, station, downtown. Use for pathfinding with limited resources and multiple transport options.

tasks.description: List of ["travel", person, destination] tasks. Default: [["travel", "alice", "park"]]
